## Checklist

- [ ] Black, Ruff, `mypy --strict`, and pytest all pass locally
- [ ] Coverage stays ≥ 90%; new tests are offline-only (no network)
- [ ] No external NLP-model dependencies introduced
- [ ] Architectural decisions are captured in an ADR (`docs/adr/`), if applicable
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under *Unreleased*, if user-facing
- [ ] Any published number is reproduced by a committed, seeded script
